Documentation.long_help: Stent-like deformation along a centerline segment between two interactive endpoints. Port 0: vessel vtkPolyData; port 1: centerline polyline. Drag the two handles to snap endpoints on the centerline; StentLength is the shortest path distance along the centerline graph; StentDiameter may be taken from CenterlineRadiusArrayName at the path midpoint (2 × inscribed sphere radius). Deformation matches SHYX Vascular Stent Placement (strict flat-capped slab, optional geodesic band smooth, same output arrays).
Documentation.short_help: Stent placement with two centerline-snapped endpoints.

InputProperty.name: Centerline
InputProperty.Documentation: Centerline polyline(s) used for endpoint snapping and stent axis path (vtkLine / vtkPolyLine).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Point1
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Endpoint 1
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: World position of stent endpoint 1 on the centerline.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Point2
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Endpoint 2
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: World position of stent endpoint 2 on the centerline.

IntVectorProperty.name: Point2VertexId
IntVectorProperty.label: Endpoint 2 vertex id
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Centerline point id for endpoint 2. Default -1 auto-initializes to the last centerline point on the first update after Centerline is connected.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: StentLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Stent Length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Measured arc length along the centerline between endpoints. Updated by 3D drag; overridden when a catalog length is selected.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: StentDiameter
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Stent Diameter
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Measured vessel diameter at the path midpoint (2 × inscribed sphere radius). Updated by 3D drag / CenterlineRadiusArrayName; overridden when a catalog diameter is selected.

IntVectorProperty.name: StentCatalogDiameterIndex
IntVectorProperty.label: Catalog diameter
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Coronary stent nominal diameter. Custom keeps the measured diameter from interaction; a catalog entry sets StentDiameter to the listed value.

IntVectorProperty.name: StentCatalogLengthIndex
IntVectorProperty.label: Catalog length
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Coronary stent nominal length. Custom keeps both endpoints from 3D interaction; a catalog entry moves both endpoints outward (if too short) or inward (if too long) one centerline vertex at a time until path length first exceeds or falls below the listed value. StentLength stores the achieved path length, which may differ slightly from the catalog nominal.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: StentAxisSampleSpacing
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Stent Axis Sample Spacing
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum arc length between consecutive samples on the internal stent axis polyline. Zero keeps only path vertices; a positive value subdivides each axis segment.

IntVectorProperty.name: PreferInputPointNormals
IntVectorProperty.label: Prefer input point normals
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, use the input surface point-data Normals array if present; otherwise vtkPolyDataNormals is run on the surface.

StringVectorProperty.name: CenterlineRadiusArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Centerline radius array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Point-data scalar on Centerline. After each interactive snap, StentDiameter is set to twice this array at the path midpoint vertex. Choose (None) to keep the current diameter.

StringVectorProperty.name: AffectMaskArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Affect mask array name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Output int array: 0 strict region, -1 elsewhere.

StringVectorProperty.name: GeodesicToZeroRegionArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Geodesic to zero-region array name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Weighted surface geodesic distance to mask-0 vertices.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: GeodesicSmoothInfluenceRange
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Geodesic smooth influence range
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Band threshold for optional geodesic smooth (0 disables).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: GeodesicSmoothPowerLambda
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Geodesic smooth power lambda
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Exponent in (1 - g/x)^λ for band strength.

StringVectorProperty.name: GeodesicSmoothStrengthArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Geodesic smooth strength array name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Band smooth strength array on output.
